title: Veterans Auto and Education Improvement Act of 2022
fullText:
Veterans Auto and Education Improvement Act of 2022 (Public Law 117-333).
An Act to amend title 38, United States Code, to make certain improvements in the laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs, and for other purposes.

SEC. 3. TEMPORARY EXTENSION OF PERIOD OF ELIGIBILITY FOR VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION PROGRAMS.
Amended sections 3101, 3103, 3104, 3105, and 3108 of Title 38. This law introduced major emergency and disaster provisions allowing for extensions of eligibility periods and entitlement duration when a veteran's training is disrupted by a public health emergency or natural disaster declared by the President.
plainEnglish: Allows veterans who are forced to pause their Chapter 31 vocational rehabilitation because of an emergency (like school closure, pandemic, or natural disaster) to get extensions of their 12-year eligibility window and additional months of subsistence allowance.
veteranUse: Cite this law if your school was closed or your program disrupted by an emergency, and your counselor is refusing to extend your entitlement or eligibility period.

amendmentNotes.note: Enacted provisions affecting 38 USC 3101, 38 USC 3103, 38 USC 3104, 38 USC 3105, 38 USC 3108, 38 USC 3117.
